nasb.text: Because I called and you refused, I stretched out my hand and no one paid attention;

esv.text: Because I have called and you refused to listen, have stretched out my hand and no one has heeded,

cnv.text: 我呼喚，你們不肯聽從； 我伸手，沒有人理會。

ccb.text: 我呼唤你们， 你们却充耳不闻； 我向你们招手， 你们却视若无睹。

csbs.text: 既然我呼唤了，你们拒绝， 我伸出了手，没有人留心，
